title: Bitcoin price avoids major Iran jitters as S&P 500 ‘short squeeze’ on horizon
summary: Bitcoin and US stocks stayed strong in the face of US-Iran escalation as analysis predicted BTC price action outperforming equities later.

title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
summary: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

title: Wall Street Won’t Give Up on Saylor’s Strategy, Sees 170% Upside
summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. is confronting a collapse of confidence almost everywhere — except among Wall Street analysts.

title: Aston Martin Raises £550 Million New Debt From HPS to Boost Cash
summary: Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings Plc has struck a deal for £550 million ($736 million) of fresh funds with BlackRock Inc.-owned HPS Investment Partners to bolster its liquidity.

title: US Seizes More Than $25M in Crypto Tied to Investment and Romance Scams
summary: Prosecutors filed five forfeiture cases as Secret Service agents traced funds from thousands of victims to launderers in Southeast Asia.

title: Centralized Elements 'Frequently Persist' in DeFi and Should Be Regulated: FATF
summary: Nearly every country has yet to apply the rules, the watchdog said, warning of outright bans for platforms that don’t comply.

title: Crypto directly employs 34,000 in the US and contributes $55 billion to the economy: NCA report
summary: Crypto directly employs 34,000 in the U.S. and contributes $55 billion to the economy in 2026, according to an NCA-funded report.

title: The UK’s biggest university is a private company
